tagline: Handcrafted goods made with Zimbabwean pride.
location: Corner Samora Machel & Julius Nyerere, Harare, Zimbabwe
hours: Monday–Saturday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Sunday: 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM.

services.name: Custom Furniture
services.description: Handcrafted wooden tables, chairs, shelves, and beds built to your exact specifications.

services.name: Woven Baskets
services.description: Authentic Zimbabwean woven baskets in traditional and contemporary patterns. Available in multiple sizes.

services.name: Wall Art & Décor
services.description: Original paintings, sculptures, and wall hangings by local artists. Custom commissions available.

services.name: Gift Hampers
services.description: Curated gift hampers with local products — ideal for corporate gifts, weddings, and special occasions.

services.name: Fashion Accessories
services.description: Beaded jewellery, fabric bags, and wearable art inspired by Zimbabwean heritage.

services.name: Bulk & Wholesale
services.description: Supplying craft shops, hotels, lodges, and exporters. Minimum order applies. Volume discounts available.
services.lead_time: Depends on order size — contact us for a quote

pricing.price: USD 150 – 2000+ depending on size and material

faq.question: Do you deliver outside Harare?
faq.answer: Yes! We deliver nationwide via courier partners. Delivery fees apply based on location. We also ship internationally for bulk orders.

faq.question: Can I place a custom order?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Most of our products can be customised — size, colour, material, or design. Contact us on WhatsApp for a custom quote.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept USD cash, EcoCash, bank transfer (ZWL and USD), and mobile money. We do not accept credit cards currently.

faq.question: Do you offer corporate or bulk discounts?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer discounts for orders above USD 300 and have special corporate gifting packages. Get in touch for a quote.

faq.question: How long does delivery take in Harare?
faq.answer: Harare same-day or next-day delivery is available for most in-stock items. Custom orders take longer — see individual product lead times.

faq.question: Do you have a physical shop?
faq.answer: Yes, we are located at Corner Samora Machel & Julius Nyerere in Harare. Open Mon–Sat 8AM–6PM and Sunday 10AM–3PM.

faq.question: Can I see samples before ordering?
faq.answer: Yes, you can visit our shop or request photos/videos via WhatsApp before placing your order.

lead_qualifying_questions: What product or service are you interested in?
When do you need it by?
Do you have a budget in mind?
What is the best number to reach you on?
